parameters: I wanted to make my family great. I went through many difficulties
and finally secured a place for myself in the Empire, but...
What awaited my success was a dark maelstrom of money and lust.
I can see you've not yet lost hope. Looking at you reminds me of
how I once was. Take this.
It was an honor for me to have a place in the Third Empire, but now
my position's nothing more than a chain that binds me.
Please evacuate! The castle's currently being invaded by
